data.body:
## Done Definitions

- When this epic is complete, all existing v2 RED tests pass (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh, test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh, test-review-stop-check.sh v2 assertion)
  ← Satisfies: "All existing v2 RED tests pass"
- When this epic is complete, grep -r '\.tickets/' across hooks, scripts, and skills returns zero matches (excluding .tickets-tracker/)
  ← Satisfies: "No .tickets/ path references remain in hooks, scripts, or skills"
- When this epic is complete, grep -rw 'tk' in CLAUDE.md and skill files returns zero bare CLI references (only 'ticket' CLI)
  ← Satisfies: "No bare tk CLI references remain"
- When this epic is complete, the migration docs directory (docs/ticket-migraiton-v3/, docs/designs/adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md) no longer exists
  ← Satisfies: "Historical migration docs are removed"
- When this epic is complete, orphaned-tasks.sh and restore-ticket-bodies.sh no longer exist in the scripts directory
  ← Satisfies: "Legacy v2-only scripts are removed"
- When this epic is complete, validate.sh --ci exits 0
  ← Satisfies: "validate.sh --ci passes after all changes"

## Scope

IN:
- Remove .tickets/ path references from hooks, scripts, skills, prompts
- Remove bare 'tk' CLI references from CLAUDE.md and skill files
- Remove legacy v2-only scripts (orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh)
- Remove historical migration docs (adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md, ticket-migraiton-v3/)
- Update .tickets/ guards to .tickets-tracker/ where guard logic is still needed for v3
- Remove v2 hook passthroughs (cascade-circuit-breaker.sh, review-stop-check.sh, title-length-validator.sh)
- Remove .tickets/ exclusion patterns from diff/review tooling once no .tickets/ dir exists
- Update test references (tk list → ticket list, _mock_tk_list → _mock_ticket_list)

OUT:
- .tickets-tracker/ (v3 system) — no changes
- ticket CLI dispatcher and v3 scripts — no changes
- ADR 0001 (outbound Jira bridge) — historical record, mentions v2 only in passing context

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Guard updates in resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md and end-session/SKILL.md must preserve fail-safe conflict handling behavior — update path from .tickets/ to .tickets-tracker/, do not remove the guard logic
- [Testing] Existing RED tests (test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh, test-v2-clean-guard.sh, etc.) provide built-in verification at each stage
- [Maintainability] Story 4506-e5da already tracks hook passthrough removal — this epic subsumes that work
